ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "menu_hint" TEXT /* Menu hint or short description of the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_dt" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., horse racing, greyhound racing) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., upcoming, in-progress, completed) */,
  "event_result" TEXT /* Result of the event (e.g., winner, draw, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selections" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the selection is part of */,
  "selection_name" TEXT /* Name of the selection (e.g., horse name) */,
  "win_lose" INTEGER /* Indicates if the selection won (1) or lost (0) */,
  "bsp" REAL /* Betfair Starting Price (BSP) */,
  "jockey" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "trainer" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "form_stats" TEXT /* Form statistics (e.g., recent wins, losses, draws) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selections_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds_data" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds data record */,
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selection the odds data belongs to */,
  "ppwap" REAL /* Pre-play Weighted Average Price (PPWAP) */,
  "morningwap" REAL /* Morning Weighted Average Price (MORNINGWAP) */,
  "ppmax" REAL /* Pre-play Maximum Price (PPMAX) */,
  "ppmin" REAL /* Pre-play Minimum Price (PPMIN) */,
  "ipmax" REAL /* In-play Maximum Price (IPMAX) */,
  "ipmin" REAL /* In-play Minimum Price (IPMIN) */,
  "morningtradedvol" REAL /* Morning Traded Volume (MORNINGTRADEDVOL) */,
  "pptradedvol" REAL /* Pre-play Traded Volume (PPTRADEDVOL) */,
  "iptradedvol" REAL /* In-play Traded Volume (IPTRADEDVOL) */,
  "odds_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the odds data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_data_selection_id FOREIGN KEY ("selection_id") REFERENCES selections ("selection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, analyst) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selection the bet is placed on */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., win, place, each way) */,
  "bet_dt" TEXT /* Date and time the bet was placed */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the bet (e.g., win, lose, pending) */,
  "payout_amount" REAL /* Payout amount for the bet (if won) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_selection_id FOREIGN KEY ("selection_id") REFERENCES selections ("selection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet the transaction is related to */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, payout) */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_dt" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES bets ("bet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., racing, team sport) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sports" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the event belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "sport_id")
)
